title: gagea fragifera
intro: Gagea fragifera, also known as the raspberry pimpernel or raspberry lily, is a flowering plant species in the lily family (Liliaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Consuming Gagea fragifera has been reported to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving coughs, and aiding in digestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
